name: Moroccan Lemon Chicken with Olives
recipeIngredient: 2 Medium garlic cloves, peeled and minced
1/2 cup Green olives, pitted and coarsely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. In a food processor, finely chop onion and garlic.
2. Dredge chicken in flour.
3. In a large skillet, heat oil over medium heat.
4. Saute chicken and onion mixture until the mixture has softened, about 10 minutes.
5. Stir in one cup water, saffron, ginger, cumin, paprika, salt, and lemon peel.
6. Bring to a boil, reduce heat and simmer, covered, for 35 minutes.
7. Remove chicken from sauce and allow to cool a few minutes.
8. Debone chicken and cut meat into small pieces.
9. Put meat back into sauce with the lemon juice, olives, cilantro, and pepper. Simmer gently for 5 minutes.
10. While the chicken is cooking, bring 1 1/2 cups of water to a boil in a medium saucepan.
11. Add couscous and bring back to a boil.
12. Remove from heat and allow to sit for 5 minutes.
13. Spoon chicken mixture over couscous and serve.
